---
title: "acoustic-data-modeling"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Forest/Barren SVM

```{r}
all_data$TYPE <- factor(
  all_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("Barren", "Macro_Forest")
)
```

```{r}
# SVM with the same JMP Parameters

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)

BARREN_LABEL <- "Barren"
FOREST_LABEL <- "Macro_Forest"
predictors   <- c("ACI", "NDSI", "AEI", "ADI")
type_col     <- "TYPE"

# Prep data 
keep_rows  <- complete.cases(all_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
habitat_model_data <- all_data[keep_rows, ]
habitat_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(habitat_model_data[[type_col]],
                                  levels = c(BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL))

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(habitat_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(habitat_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Train SVM (cost = C = 1, gamma = sigma = 0.25, RBF kernel)
habitat_svm_model <- ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI + AEI + ADI,
  data       = model_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", habitat_svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# 3. Training predictions & confusion matrix 
train_pred <- predict(habitat_svm_model, newdata = habitat_model_data)
stopifnot(length(train_pred) == nrow(habitat_model_data))

conf_mat  <- table(Actual = habitat_model_data[[type_col]], Predicted = train_pred)
conf_rate <- prop.table(conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(conf_rate, 3))

misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(conf_mat)) / sum(conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(misclass_rate, 7), "\n")
cat("(JMP reference:          0.2158539)\n")
```

```{r}
# PLOTS
  # Response Profile Plot (ACI vs NDSI decision boundary)
AEI_fixed <- mean(habitat_model_data$AEI, na.rm = TRUE)
ADI_fixed <- mean(habitat_model_data$ADI, na.rm = TRUE)

grid <- expand.grid(
  NDSI = seq(min(habitat_model_data$NDSI), max(habitat_model_data$NDSI), length.out = 150),
  ACI  = seq(min(habitat_model_data$ACI),  max(habitat_model_data$ACI),  length.out = 150)
) %>%
  mutate(AEI = AEI_fixed, ADI = ADI_fixed)

grid$pred_class <- as.character(predict(habitat_svm_model, newdata = grid))

p_profile <- ggplot(grid, aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, fill = pred_class)) +
  geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE, alpha = 0.75) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Barren"       = "#F4CCCC",
               "Macro_Forest" = "#C9DAF8"),
    name   = "TYPE",
    labels = c("Barren"       = "TYPE = Barren",
               "Macro_Forest" = "TYPE = Macro_Forest")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Response Profile Plot",
    subtitle = paste0("AEI fixed at ", round(AEI_fixed, 4),
                      "  |  ADI fixed at ", round(ADI_fixed, 4)),
    x = "NDSI",
    y = "ACI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(p_profile)

# Confusion matrix summary
cat("  Confusion Matrix Summary\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-15s  %-20s  %-20s  %-10s\n",
            "Actual", "Pred:Barren", "Pred:Forest", "Misclass"))
for (lv in c(BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL)) {
  rc <- conf_mat[lv, ]
  rr <- conf_rate[lv, ]
  cat(sprintf("  %-15s  %-20s  %-20s  %-10s\n",
              lv,
              paste0(rc[BARREN_LABEL], " (", round(rr[BARREN_LABEL], 3), ")"),
              paste0(rc[FOREST_LABEL], " (", round(rr[FOREST_LABEL], 3), ")"),
              round(1 - rr[lv], 3)))
}
cat(sprintf("\n  Overall Misclassification Rate: %.7f\n", misclass_rate))

# Probability Outputs
prob_all <- predict(habitat_svm_model, newdata = habitat_model_data, type = "probabilities")
habitat_model_data$prob_barren <- prob_all[, BARREN_LABEL]
habitat_model_data$prob_forest <- prob_all[, FOREST_LABEL]
habitat_model_data$gradient_score <- habitat_model_data$prob_barren  # 0 = forest, 1 = barren

# Habitat type bar plot
type_summary <- habitat_model_data %>%
  group_by(TYPE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prob_barren = mean(prob_barren),
    mean_prob_forest = mean(prob_forest),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_prob_barren, mean_prob_forest),
    names_to  = "predicted_as",
    values_to = "mean_prob"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_as = if_else(predicted_as == "mean_prob_barren",
                           "Predicted to be urchin barrens",
                           "Predicted to be Macrocystis Forest"),
    TYPE_label = if_else(TYPE == BARREN_LABEL,
                         "Urchin Barrens",
                         "Macrocystis Forest")  
  )

p_jmp <- ggplot(jmp_summary,
                aes(x = TYPE_label, y = mean_prob, fill = predicted_as)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(mean_prob, 2)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Predicted to be urchin barrens"     = "#B22222",
               "Predicted to be Macrocystis Forest" = "#4472C4"),
    labels = c("Predicted to be urchin barrens"     = "Predicted to be Urchin Barrens",
               "Predicted to be Macrocystis Forest" = expression("Predicted to be"~italic("Macrocystis")~"Forest")),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08)),
    name   = "Probability of assignment (SVM)"
  ) +
  xlab(NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

print(p_jmp)

# Site-level mean gradient scores 
gradient_summary <- habitat_model_data %>%
  group_by(site, TYPE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gradient_score = mean(gradient_score),
    se_gradient_score   = sd(gradient_score) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Clean site labels: replace _ with space, title case
    site_label = gsub("_", " ", site),
    site_label = tools::toTitleCase(site_label),
    # Clean TYPE labels for legend
    type_label = if_else(TYPE == BARREN_LABEL, "Urchin Barren", "Macrocystis Forest")
  )

# Legend labels with italics for Macrocystis using expression/parse
legend_labels <- c(
  "Urchin Barren"      = "Urchin Barren",
  "Macrocystis Forest" = "italic(Macrocystis)~Forest"
)

p_gradient <- ggplot(gradient_summary,
                     aes(x = reorder(site_label, mean_gradient_score),
                         y = mean_gradient_score,
                         fill = type_label)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_gradient_score - se_gradient_score,
        ymax = mean_gradient_score + se_gradient_score),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Urchin Barren"      = "firebrick3",
               "Macrocystis Forest" = "steelblue3"),
    name   = "TYPE",
    labels = c("Urchin Barren"      = "Urchin Barren",
               "Macrocystis Forest" = expression(italic("Macrocystis")~"Forest"))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
    name   = "Mean gradient score  (0 = forest  \u2192  1 = barren)"
  ) +
  xlab("Site") +
  ggtitle("Mean gradient score by site",
          subtitle = "Error bars = \u00B1 SE; dashed line = classification threshold") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

print(p_gradient)
# Site level summary table
site_summary <- habitat_model_data %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarise(
    true_type           = first(TYPE),
    mean_gradient_score = mean(gradient_score),
    n_sequences         = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pred_class = if_else(mean_gradient_score >= 0.5, BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL),
    correct    = (true_type == pred_class)
  ) %>%
  arrange(mean_gradient_score)

cat("\n--- Site-Level Gradient Summary ---\n")
print(site_summary)

# Save plots
ggsave("habitat_svm_barplot.png",      plot = p_jmp,      width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 150)
ggsave("habitat_svm_response_profile.png", plot = p_profile,  width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 150)
ggsave("habitat_svm_gradient_scores.png",  plot = p_gradient, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 150)
cat("\nDone. Plots saved.\n")
```

## More Plots!

### Violin Plot of Acoustic Indices by Habitat Type

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)

# Pivot to long format
long_data <- all_data %>%
  select(TYPE, NDSI, ACI, ADI, AEI) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(NDSI, ACI, ADI, AEI),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "value")

# Keep index order
long_data$index <- factor(long_data$index, levels = c("NDSI", "ACI", "ADI", "AEI"))

ggplot(long_data, aes(x = TYPE, y = value, fill = index, color = index)) +
  geom_violin(linewidth = 0.8, trim = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ index, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "NDSI" = "#648FFF",
    "ACI"  = "#DC267F",
    "ADI"  = "#FE6100",
    "AEI"  = "#F9DE56"
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
     "NDSI" = "#648FFF",
    "ACI"  = "#DC267F",
    "ADI"  = "#FE6100",
    "AEI"  = "#F9DE56"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "Habitat Type", y = NULL)
```

### SVM Probability Plot By Index

```{r}
library(kernlab)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

# Extract barren probability
prob_barren <- probs[, "Barren"]

# Build plotting dataframe
plot_df <- model_data %>%
  select(NDSI, ACI, ADI, AEI) %>%
  mutate(prob_barren = prob_barren)

# Function to make one panel
make_panel <- function(df, index, color) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[index]], y = prob_barren)) +
    geom_point(color = color, alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(color = "black", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = index, y = NULL)
}

# Build each panel
p1 <- make_panel(plot_df, "NDSI", "#648FFF")
p2 <- make_panel(plot_df, "ACI",  "#DC267F")
p3 <- make_panel(plot_df, "ADI",  "#FE6100")
p4 <- make_panel(plot_df, "AEI",  "#F9DE56")

# Combine
wrap_plots(p1, p2, p3, p4, nrow = 1) +
  plot_layout(axis_titles = "collect") &
  labs(y = "Probability of assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)") &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
```

## Urchin Activity Acoustics Modeling

These acoustics are from three red urchins placed on different substrate/food types (rocks with crustose coralline algae, bare rock, and bare rock with kelp), and recorded underwater (about 30ft depth) for 2 days each.

### CCA SVM

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)
library(here)

# Read in data
cca_urchin_data <- read.csv("/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/filtered_data/Sage_Constraints_Experiment_CCA Urchin Indices.csv")

# Clean TYPE and fix NDSI class
cca_urchin_data$TYPE <- trimws(cca_urchin_data$TYPE)
cca_urchin_data$NDSI <- as.numeric(cca_urchin_data$NDSI)

URCHIN_LABEL    <- "URCHIN_CCA"
NO_URCHIN_LABEL <- "NO URCHIN_CCA"
predictors      <- c("ACI", "NDSI")
type_col        <- "TYPE"

# Prep data
keep_rows             <- complete.cases(cca_urchin_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
cca_urchin_model_data <- cca_urchin_data[keep_rows, ]
cca_urchin_model_data <- cca_urchin_model_data %>% filter(!is.na(TYPE))
cca_urchin_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(
  cca_urchin_model_data[[type_col]],
  levels = c(URCHIN_LABEL, NO_URCHIN_LABEL)
)

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(cca_urchin_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(cca_urchin_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Build clean dataframe
cca_clean_data <- data.frame(
  TYPE = ifelse(trimws(cca_urchin_data$TYPE) == "URCHIN_CCA", "URCHIN_CCA", "NO_URCHIN_CCA"),
  ACI  = as.numeric(cca_urchin_data$ACI),
  NDSI = as.numeric(cca_urchin_data$NDSI)
)
cca_clean_data <- na.omit(cca_clean_data)
cca_clean_data$TYPE <- factor(
  cca_clean_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("URCHIN_CCA", "NO_URCHIN_CCA")
)

cat("Clean data class counts:\n")
print(table(cca_clean_data$TYPE))
nrow(cca_clean_data)

# Train SVM
cca_urchin_svm_model <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = cca_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", cca_urchin_svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# Training predictions & confusion matrix
cca_train_pred <- predict(cca_urchin_svm_model, newdata = cca_clean_data)
cca_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = cca_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = cca_train_pred)
cca_conf_rate  <- prop.table(cca_conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(cca_conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(cca_conf_rate, 3))

cca_misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(cca_conf_mat)) / sum(cca_conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(cca_misclass_rate, 7), "\n")

# 5-fold cross validation
set.seed(123)
cca_urchin_svm_cv <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = cca_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  cross      = 5,
  scaled     = TRUE
)
cat("5-fold CV error:", cross(cca_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
cat("5-fold CV accuracy:", 1 - cross(cca_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

cca_urchin_model_data$NDSI <- as.numeric(cca_urchin_model_data$NDSI)

cca_urchin_model_data %>%
  select(TYPE, ACI, NDSI) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ACI, NDSI), names_to = "index", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TYPE, y = value, fill = TYPE)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ index, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("URCHIN_CCA" = "#648FFF", "NO URCHIN_CCA" = "#DC267F")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Value")
```

```{r}
# Create prediction grid over ACI and NDSI ranges
ACI_range  <- seq(min(cca_clean_data$ACI), max(cca_clean_data$ACI), length.out = 200)
NDSI_range <- seq(min(cca_clean_data$NDSI), max(cca_clean_data$NDSI), length.out = 200)

cca_grid <- expand.grid(ACI = ACI_range, NDSI = NDSI_range)

cca_grid$pred_class <- predict(cca_urchin_svm_model, newdata = cca_grid)

cca_p_profile <- ggplot(cca_grid, aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, fill = pred_class)) +
  geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data        = cca_clean_data,
    aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, shape = TYPE),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size        = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("URCHIN_CCA"    = "#F4CCCC",
               "NO_URCHIN_CCA" = "#C9DAF8"),
    name   = "Predicted Class",
    labels = c("URCHIN_CCA"    = "Urchins on CCA",
               "NO_URCHIN_CCA" = "Background Noise")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("URCHIN_CCA"    = 16,
               "NO_URCHIN_CCA" = 17),
    name   = "Actual Class",
    labels = c("URCHIN_CCA"    = "Urchins on CCA",
               "NO_URCHIN_CCA" = "Background Noise")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Response Profile Plot â€” CCA",
    x     = "NDSI",
    y     = "ACI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(cca_p_profile)
```

### Bare Rock SVM

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)
library(here)

# Read in data
rock_urchin_data <- read.csv("/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/filtered_data/Sage_Constraints_Experiment_Bare Rock Urchin Indices.csv")

# Fix NDSI class
rock_urchin_data$NDSI <- as.numeric(rock_urchin_data$NDSI)

URCHIN_LABEL    <- "URCHINS_BARE ROCK"
NO_URCHIN_LABEL <- "NO URCHINS_BARE ROCK"
predictors      <- c("ACI", "NDSI")
type_col        <- "TYPE"

# Prep data
keep_rows              <- complete.cases(rock_urchin_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
rock_urchin_model_data  <- urchin_data[keep_rows, ]
rock_urchin_model_data  <- cca_urchin_model_data %>% filter(!is.na(TYPE))
rock_urchin_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(
  rock_urchin_model_data[[type_col]],
  levels = c(URCHIN_LABEL, NO_URCHIN_LABEL)
)

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(rock_urchin_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(rock_urchin_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Start from raw data
rock_clean_data <- data.frame(
  TYPE = gsub(" ", "_", as.character(rock_urchin_data$TYPE)),
  ACI  = as.numeric(rock_urchin_data$ACI),
  NDSI = as.numeric(rock_urchin_data$NDSI)
)

# Remove NAs
rock_clean_data <- na.omit(rock_clean_data)

# Factor with corrected levels
rock_clean_data$TYPE <- factor(
  rock_clean_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("URCHINS_BARE_ROCK", "NO_URCHINS_BARE_ROCK")
)

table(rock_clean_data$TYPE)
nrow(rock_clean_data)
head(rock_clean_data)


# Train SVM
rock_urchin_svm_model <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = rock_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", rock_urchin_svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# Training predictions & confusion matrix
rock_train_pred <- predict(rock_urchin_svm_model, newdata = rock_clean_data)
rock_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = rock_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = rock_train_pred)
rock_conf_rate  <- prop.table(rock_conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(rock_conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(rock_conf_rate, 3))

rock_misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(rock_conf_mat)) / sum(rock_conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(rock_misclass_rate, 7), "\n")

# 5-fold cross validation
set.seed(123)
rock_urchin_svm_cv <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = rock_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  cross      = 5,
  scaled     = TRUE
)
cat("5-fold CV error:", cross(rock_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
cat("5-fold CV accuracy:", 1 - cross(rock_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Create prediction grid over ACI and NDSI ranges
ACI_range  <- seq(min(rock_clean_data$ACI), max(rock_clean_data$ACI), length.out = 200)
NDSI_range <- seq(min(rock_clean_data$NDSI), max(rock_clean_data$NDSI), length.out = 200)

rock_grid <- expand.grid(ACI = ACI_range, NDSI = NDSI_range)

# Predict class for each grid point
rock_grid$pred_class <- predict(rock_urchin_svm_model, newdata = rock_grid)

# Plot
rock_p_profile <- ggplot(rock_grid, aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, fill = pred_class)) +
  geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data        = rock_clean_data,
    aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, shape = TYPE),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size        = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("URCHINS_BARE_ROCK"    = "#F4CCCC",
               "NO_URCHINS_BARE_ROCK" = "#C9DAF8"),
    name   = "Predicted Class",
    labels = c("URCHINS_BARE_ROCK"    = "Urchins on bare rock",
               "NO_URCHINS_BARE_ROCK" = "Background noise")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("URCHINS_BARE_ROCK"    = 16,
               "NO_URCHINS_BARE_ROCK" = 17),
    name   = "Actual Class",
    labels = c("URCHINS_BARE_ROCK"    = "Urchins on bare rock",
               "NO_URCHINS_BARE_ROCK" = "Background noise")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Response Profile Plot â€” Bare Rock",
    x     = "NDSI",
    y     = "ACI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(rock_p_profile)
```

### Kelp on Bare Rock SVM

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)
library(here)

# Read in data
kelp_urchin_data <- read.csv("/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/filtered_data/Sage_Constraints_Experiment_Kelp Urchin Indices.csv")

# Fix NDSI class
kelp_urchin_data$NDSI <- as.numeric(kelp_urchin_data$NDSI)

URCHIN_LABEL    <- "URCHINS_KELP"
NO_URCHIN_LABEL <- "NO URCHINS_KELP"
predictors      <- c("ACI", "NDSI")
type_col        <- "TYPE"

# Prep data
keep_rows              <- complete.cases(kelp_urchin_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
kelp_urchin_model_data  <- kelp_urchin_data[keep_rows, ]
kelp_urchin_model_data  <- kelp_urchin_model_data %>% filter(!is.na(TYPE))
kelp_urchin_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(
  kelp_urchin_model_data[[type_col]],
  levels = c(URCHIN_LABEL, NO_URCHIN_LABEL)
)

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(kelp_urchin_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(kelp_urchin_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Start from raw data
kelp_clean_data <- data.frame(
  TYPE = ifelse(kelp_urchin_data$TYPE == "URCHIN_KELP", "URCHIN_KELP", "NO_URCHIN_KELP"),
  ACI  = as.numeric(kelp_urchin_data$ACI),
  NDSI = as.numeric(kelp_urchin_data$NDSI)
)

kelp_clean_data <- na.omit(kelp_clean_data)

kelp_clean_data$TYPE <- factor(
  kelp_clean_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("URCHIN_KELP", "NO_URCHIN_KELP")
)

table(kelp_clean_data$TYPE)
nrow(kelp_clean_data)
head(kelp_clean_data)


# Train SVM
kelp_urchin_svm_model <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = kelp_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", kelp_urchin_svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# Training predictions & confusion matrix
kelp_train_pred <- predict(kelp_urchin_svm_model, newdata = kelp_clean_data)
kelp_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = kelp_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = kelp_train_pred)
kelp_conf_rate  <- prop.table(kelp_conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(kelp_conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(kelp_conf_rate, 3))

kelp_misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(kelp_conf_mat)) / sum(kelp_conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(kelp_misclass_rate, 7), "\n")

# 5-fold cross validation
set.seed(123)
kelp_urchin_svm_cv <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = kelp_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  cross      = 5,
  scaled     = TRUE
)
cat("5-fold CV error:", cross(kelp_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
cat("5-fold CV accuracy:", 1 - cross(kelp_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Create prediction grid over ACI and NDSI ranges
ACI_range  <- seq(min(kelp_clean_data$ACI), max(kelp_clean_data$ACI), length.out = 200)
NDSI_range <- seq(min(kelp_clean_data$NDSI), max(kelp_clean_data$NDSI), length.out = 200)

kelp_grid <- expand.grid(ACI = ACI_range, NDSI = NDSI_range)

# Predict class for each grid point
kelp_grid$pred_class <- predict(kelp_urchin_svm_model, newdata = kelp_grid)

# Plot
kelp_p_profile <- ggplot(kelp_grid, aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, fill = pred_class)) +
  geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data        = kelp_clean_data,
    aes(x = NDSI, y = ACI, shape = TYPE),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size        = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("URCHIN_KELP"    = "#F4CCCC",
               "NO_URCHIN_KELP" = "#C9DAF8"),
    name   = "Predicted Class",
    labels = c("URCHIN_KELP"    = "Urchins on Kelp",
               "NO_URCHIN_KELP" = "Background Noise")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("URCHIN_KELP"    = 16,
               "NO_URCHIN_KELP" = 17),
    name   = "Actual Class",
    labels = c("URCHIN_KELP"    = "Urchins on Kelp",
               "NO_URCHIN_KELP" = "Background Noise")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Response Profile Plot â€” Kelp",
    x     = "NDSI",
    y     = "ACI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(kelp_p_profile)
```

### Principle component with all 3 SVMs

To combine urchin acoustic svms into one synthetic variable, first they must be pushed through the general habitat acoustics to create probabilities for each

```{r}
# Step 1 â€” predict all three urchin SVMs onto full model_data
cca_probs_full  <- predict(cca_urchin_svm_model,  newdata = data.frame(
                              ACI  = model_data$ACI,
                              NDSI = model_data$NDSI), 
                            type = "probabilities")[, "URCHIN_CCA"]

rock_probs_full <- predict(rock_urchin_svm_model, newdata = data.frame(
                              ACI  = as.numeric(model_data$ACI),
                              NDSI = as.numeric(model_data$NDSI)),
                            type = "probabilities")[, "URCHINS_BARE_ROCK"]

kelp_probs_full <- predict(kelp_urchin_svm_model, newdata = data.frame(
                              ACI  = model_data$ACI,
                              NDSI = model_data$NDSI),
                            type = "probabilities")[, "URCHIN_KELP"]

# Step 2 â€” combine into one dataframe and run PCA
urchin_prob_df <- data.frame(
  cca_prob  = cca_probs_full,
  rock_prob = rock_probs_full,
  kelp_prob = kelp_probs_full
)

urchin_pca  <- prcomp(urchin_prob_df, scale. = TRUE)
summary(urchin_pca)

# Step 3 â€” extract PC1 (negating pc1 as well)
pc1_scores <- -urchin_pca$x[, "PC1"]

# Step 4 â€” get habitat SVM probabilities for full model_data
habitat_probs <- predict(habitat_svm_model, newdata = habitat_model_data, type = "probabilities")
prob_barren_all <- habitat_probs[, "Barren"]

# Step 5 â€” regress and plot
pc1_df <- data.frame(
  pc1         = pc1_scores,
  prob_barren = prob_barren_all
)

lm_pc1 <- lm(prob_barren ~ pc1, data = pc1_df)
summary(lm_pc1)

# Plot
ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "steelblue", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_pc1)$r.squared, 3),
                          ", P = ", format(summary(lm_pc1)$coefficients[2, 4],
                                           scientific = TRUE, digits = 2)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

## Acoustic and Ecological Relationships

### Stepwise Multiple Regression - Forest/Barren SVM

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(here)

# Read in ecological data
eco_data <- read.csv("/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/ecological_data/ecological_variables_summary.csv")

# Clean column names
eco_data <- eco_data %>%
  rename(
    red_urchin_biomass  = `Mean.Mean.Red.Urchin.Biomass...m2.`,
    stipe_density       = `Mean.Mean.Stipe.Density..m.2..`,
    red_urchin_density  = `Mean.Strongylocentrotus.franciscanus..red.urchin.m.2.`,
    green_urchin_density = `Mean.Strongylocentrotus..green.urchin.m.2.`
  )

# Step 1 - add prob to model_data
model_data$prob_barren <- prob_barren_all

# Step 2 - mean per site
prob_by_site <- model_data %>%
  group_by(SITE) %>%
  summarise(mean_prob = mean(prob_barren, na.rm = TRUE))

# Step 3 - join
regression_data <- left_join(prob_by_site, eco_data, by = "SITE")

# Step 4 - confirm before running regression
print(regression_data[, c("SITE", "mean_prob")])

# Step 5 - only run regression after confirming values look right
null_model <- lm(mean_prob ~ 1, data = regression_data)
full_model <- lm(
  mean_prob ~ red_urchin_density + red_urchin_biomass +
              green_urchin_density + stipe_density,
  data = regression_data
)
step_model_bic <- step(
  null_model,
  scope     = list(lower = null_model, upper = full_model),
  direction = "forward",
  k         = log(nrow(regression_data))
)
summary(step_model_bic)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)

# Helper function to get RÂ˛ and p for each variable
get_stats <- function(x, y) {
  fit <- summary(lm(y ~ x))
  r2  <- round(fit$r.squared, 3)
  p   <- round(fit$coefficients[2, 4], 3)
  paste0("RÂ˛ = ", r2, ", p = ", p)
}

make_panel <- function(data, xvar, xlabel) {
  stats_label <- get_stats(data[[xvar]], data$mean_prob)
  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[xvar]], y = mean_prob, color = TYPE)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = SITE), size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = stats_label,
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Barren" = "red", "Macro_Forest" = "blue")) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = xlabel, y = "SVM probability (Barren)", color = "Habitat")
}

p_red_density  <- make_panel(regression_data, "red_urchin_density",  "Red urchin density (mÂ˛)")
p_red_biomass  <- make_panel(regression_data, "red_urchin_biomass",  "Red urchin biomass (mÂ˛)")
p_green_density <- make_panel(regression_data, "green_urchin_density", "Green urchin density (mÂ˛)")
p_stipe        <- make_panel(regression_data, "stipe_density",        "Macrocystis stipe density (mÂ˛)")

(p_red_density + p_red_biomass) / (p_green_density + p_stipe) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = "SVM Probability vs Ecological Variables") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
table(cca_clean_data$TYPE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)
library(here)

# Read in data
cca_13_urchin_data <- read.csv("/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/filtered_data/Sage_Constraints_Experiment_CCA Urchin Indices - 5 Second Clips (1).csv")

# Clean TYPE and fix NDSI class
cca_13_urchin_data$TYPE <- trimws(cca_urchin_data$TYPE)
cca_13_urchin_data$NDSI <- as.numeric(cca_urchin_data$NDSI)

URCHIN_LABEL    <- "URCHIN_CCA"
NO_URCHIN_LABEL <- "NO URCHIN_CCA"
predictors      <- c("ACI", "NDSI")
type_col        <- "TYPE"

# Prep data
keep_rows             <- complete.cases(cca_13_urchin_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
cca_13_urchin_model_data <- cca_13_urchin_data[keep_rows, ]
cca_13_urchin_model_data <- cca_13_urchin_model_data %>% filter(!is.na(TYPE))
cca_13_urchin_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(
  cca_13_urchin_model_data[[type_col]],
  levels = c(URCHIN_LABEL, NO_URCHIN_LABEL)
)

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(cca_13_urchin_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(cca_13_urchin_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Build clean dataframe
cca_13_clean_data <- data.frame(
  TYPE = ifelse(trimws(cca_13_urchin_data$TYPE) == "URCHIN_CCA", "URCHIN_CCA", "NO_URCHIN_CCA"),
  ACI  = as.numeric(cca_13_urchin_data$ACI),
  NDSI = as.numeric(cca_13_urchin_data$NDSI)
)
cca_13_clean_data <- na.omit(cca_13_clean_data)
cca_13_clean_data$TYPE <- factor(
  cca_13_clean_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("URCHIN_CCA", "NO_URCHIN_CCA")
)

cat("Clean data class counts:\n")
print(table(cca_13_clean_data$TYPE))
nrow(cca_13_clean_data)

# Train SVM
cca_13_urchin_svm_model <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = cca_13_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", cca_13_urchin_svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# Training predictions & confusion matrix
cca_13_train_pred <- predict(cca_13_urchin_svm_model, newdata = cca_13_clean_data)
cca_13_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = cca_13_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = cca_13_train_pred)
cca_13_conf_rate  <- prop.table(cca_13_conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(cca_13_conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(cca_13_conf_rate, 3))

cca_13_misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(cca_13_conf_mat)) / sum(cca_13_conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(cca_13_misclass_rate, 7), "\n")

# 5-fold cross validation
set.seed(123)
cca_13_urchin_svm_cv <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = cca_13_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  cross      = 5,
  scaled     = TRUE
)
cat("5-fold CV error:", cross(cca_13_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
cat("5-fold CV accuracy:", 1 - cross(cca_13_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(kernlab)
library(here)

# Read in data
cca_12_urchin_data <- read.csv("/Users/aminashenasa/soundscapes_data/data/acoustic_data/filtered_data/Sage_Constraints_Experiment_CCA Urchin Indices - 5 Second Clips (1).csv")

# Clean TYPE and fix NDSI class
cca_12_urchin_data$TYPE <- trimws(cca_12_urchin_data$TYPE)
cca_12_urchin_data$NDSI <- as.numeric(cca_12_urchin_data$NDSI)

URCHIN_LABEL    <- "URCHIN_CCA"
NO_URCHIN_LABEL <- "NO URCHIN_CCA"
predictors      <- c("ACI", "NDSI")
type_col        <- "TYPE"

# Prep data
keep_rows                <- complete.cases(cca_12_urchin_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
cca_12_urchin_model_data <- cca_12_urchin_data[keep_rows, ]
cca_12_urchin_model_data <- cca_12_urchin_model_data %>% filter(!is.na(TYPE))
cca_12_urchin_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(
  cca_12_urchin_model_data[[type_col]],
  levels = c(URCHIN_LABEL, NO_URCHIN_LABEL)
)

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(cca_12_urchin_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(cca_12_urchin_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Build clean dataframe - drop one from each group to get 12 vs 12
cca_12_clean_data <- data.frame(
  TYPE = ifelse(trimws(cca_12_urchin_data$TYPE) == "URCHIN_CCA", "URCHIN_CCA", "NO_URCHIN_CCA"),
  ACI  = as.numeric(cca_12_urchin_data$ACI),
  NDSI = as.numeric(cca_12_urchin_data$NDSI)
)
cca_12_clean_data <- na.omit(cca_12_clean_data)

# Trim to 12 vs 12
cca_12_clean_data <- cca_12_clean_data %>%
  group_by(TYPE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  ungroup()

cca_12_clean_data$TYPE <- factor(
  cca_12_clean_data$TYPE,
  levels = c("URCHIN_CCA", "NO_URCHIN_CCA")
)

cat("Clean data class counts:\n")
print(table(cca_12_clean_data$TYPE))
nrow(cca_12_clean_data)

# Train SVM
cca_12_urchin_svm_model <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = cca_12_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  prob.model = TRUE,
  scaled     = TRUE
)

cat("\n--- Model Summary ---\n")
cat("Kernel:                   Radial Basis Function\n")
cat("Cost (C):                ", 1, "\n")
cat("Gamma (sigma):           ", 0.25, "\n")
cat("Number of Support Vectors:", cca_12_urchin_svm_model@nSV, "\n")

# Training predictions & confusion matrix
cca_12_train_pred <- predict(cca_12_urchin_svm_model, newdata = cca_12_clean_data)
cca_12_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = cca_12_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = cca_12_train_pred)
cca_12_conf_rate  <- prop.table(cca_12_conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(cca_12_conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(cca_12_conf_rate, 3))

cca_12_misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(cca_12_conf_mat)) / sum(cca_12_conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(cca_12_misclass_rate, 7), "\n")

# 5-fold cross validation
set.seed(123)
cca_12_urchin_svm_cv <- kernlab::ksvm(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI,
  data       = cca_12_clean_data,
  kernel     = "rbfdot",
  kpar       = list(sigma = 0.25),
  C          = 1,
  cross      = 5,
  scaled     = TRUE
)
cat("5-fold CV error:", cross(cca_12_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
cat("5-fold CV accuracy:", 1 - cross(cca_12_urchin_svm_cv), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Get full dataset probabilities for both CCA versions
cca_12_probs_full <- predict(cca_12_urchin_svm_model, 
                              newdata = data.frame(ACI  = model_data$ACI, 
                                                   NDSI = model_data$NDSI), 
                              type = "probabilities")[, "URCHIN_CCA"]

cca_13_probs_full <- predict(cca_13_urchin_svm_model, 
                              newdata = data.frame(ACI  = model_data$ACI, 
                                                   NDSI = model_data$NDSI), 
                              type = "probabilities")[, "URCHIN_CCA"]

# Build PCA and regression pipeline for each
run_pipeline <- function(cca_probs, label) {
  
  # Combine three urchin model probabilities
  urchin_prob_df <- data.frame(
    cca_prob  = cca_probs,
    rock_prob = rock_probs_full,
    kelp_prob = kelp_probs_full
  )
  
  # PCA
  pca    <- prcomp(urchin_prob_df, scale. = TRUE)
  cat(label, "â€” PCA variance explained:\n")
  print(summary(pca)$importance)
  
  # Extract PC1 (flip sign so more urchin noise = positive)
  pc1 <- -pca$x[, "PC1"]
  
  # Regress against habitat SVM probability
  lm_fit <- lm(prob_barren_all ~ pc1)
  r2     <- round(summary(lm_fit)$r.squared, 3)
  adj_r2 <- round(summary(lm_fit)$adj.r.squared, 3)
  p      <- summary(lm_fit)$coefficients[2, 4]
  f      <- summary(lm_fit)$fstatistic
  
  cat(label, "â€” RÂ˛:", r2, "| Adj RÂ˛:", adj_r2, 
      "| F:", round(f[1], 2), "| p:", format(p, scientific = TRUE), "\n\n")
  
  # Return for plotting
  list(pc1 = pc1, lm_fit = lm_fit, label = label, r2 = r2, p = p)
}

results_12 <- run_pipeline(cca_12_probs_full, "CCA 12 vs 12")
results_13 <- run_pipeline(cca_13_probs_full, "CCA 13 vs 13")
```

```{r}
run_pipeline_noflip <- function(cca_probs, label) {
  urchin_prob_df <- data.frame(
    cca_prob  = cca_probs,
    rock_prob = rock_probs_full,
    kelp_prob = kelp_probs_full
  )
  pca    <- prcomp(urchin_prob_df, scale. = TRUE)
  pc1    <- pca$x[, "PC1"]  # no flip
  lm_fit <- lm(prob_barren_all ~ pc1)
  r2     <- round(summary(lm_fit)$r.squared, 3)
  cat(label, "â€” RÂ˛:", r2, "\n")
}

run_pipeline_noflip(cca_12_probs_full, "CCA 12 no flip")
run_pipeline_noflip(cca_13_probs_full, "CCA 13 no flip")
```

```{r}
nrow(pc1_df)
```

```{r}
ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_pc1)$r.squared, 3),
                          ", P < 0.0001"),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
pc1_df$SITE <- model_data$SITE
pc1_df$TYPE <- model_data$TYPE

ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = SITE), alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = SITE, group = SITE), method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_pc1)$r.squared, 3),
                          ", P < 0.0001"),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Harris_Island"  = "red",
    "Samsing_Cove"   = "orange",
    "Sandy_Cove"     = "pink",
    "Battery_Island" = "blue",
    "Crow_Island"    = "purple",
    "Middle_Island"  = "green"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x     = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y     = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)",
    color = "Site"
  ) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
unique(model_data$SITE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = SITE), alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = SITE, group = SITE), method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_pc1)$r.squared, 3),
                          ", P < 0.0001"),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
     "Harris_Island"  = "red",
    "Samsing_Cove"   = "orange",
    "Sandy_Cove"     = "pink",
    "Battery_Island" = "blue",
    "Crow_Island"    = "purple",
    "Middle_Island"  = "green"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x     = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y     = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)",
    color = "Site"
  ) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

## DFA Approach Alternative

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)

BARREN_LABEL <- "Barren"
FOREST_LABEL <- "Macro_Forest"
predictors   <- c("ACI", "NDSI", "AEI", "ADI")
type_col     <- "TYPE"

# Prep data
keep_rows          <- complete.cases(all_data[, c(predictors, type_col)])
habitat_model_data <- all_data[keep_rows, ]
habitat_model_data[[type_col]] <- factor(
  habitat_model_data[[type_col]],
  levels = c(BARREN_LABEL, FOREST_LABEL)
)

cat("Total rows used:", nrow(habitat_model_data), "\n")
cat("Class counts:\n")
print(table(habitat_model_data[[type_col]]))

# Train LDA
habitat_lda_model <- lda(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI + AEI + ADI,
  data = habitat_model_data
)

cat("\n--- LDA Model Summary ---\n")
print(habitat_lda_model)

# Training predictions & confusion matrix
habitat_lda_pred <- predict(habitat_lda_model, newdata = habitat_model_data)

stopifnot(length(habitat_lda_pred$class) == nrow(habitat_model_data))

conf_mat  <- table(Actual = habitat_model_data[[type_col]], Predicted = habitat_lda_pred$class)
conf_rate <- prop.table(conf_mat, margin = 1)

cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(conf_mat)
cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix (Predicted Rates) ---\n")
print(round(conf_rate, 3))

misclass_rate <- 1 - sum(diag(conf_mat)) / sum(conf_mat)
cat("\nMisclassification Rate:", round(misclass_rate, 7), "\n")
cat("(JMP SVM reference:      0.2158539)\n")

# Leave-one-out cross validation
habitat_lda_cv <- lda(
  TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI + AEI + ADI,
  data = habitat_model_data,
  CV   = TRUE
)

cv_conf_mat  <- table(Actual = habitat_model_data[[type_col]], Predicted = habitat_lda_cv$class)
cv_conf_rate <- prop.table(cv_conf_mat, margin = 1)
cv_misclass  <- 1 - sum(diag(cv_conf_mat)) / sum(cv_conf_mat)

cat("\n--- LOO-CV Confusion Matrix (Counts) ---\n")
print(cv_conf_mat)
cat("\n--- LOO-CV Confusion Matrix (Rates) ---\n")
print(round(cv_conf_rate, 3))
cat("LOO-CV Misclassification Rate:", round(cv_misclass, 7), "\n")

# Extract posterior probabilities for downstream use
prob_barren_lda <- habitat_lda_pred$posterior[, "Barren"]
```

```{r}
library(MASS)

# CCA
cca_lda_model <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = cca_clean_data)
cca_lda_pred  <- predict(cca_lda_model, newdata = cca_clean_data)

conf_mat <- table(Actual = cca_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = cca_lda_pred$class)
print(conf_mat)
cat("Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(conf_mat)) / sum(conf_mat), "\n")

# Bare Rock
rock_lda_model <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = rock_clean_data)
rock_lda_pred  <- predict(rock_lda_model, newdata = rock_clean_data)

conf_mat <- table(Actual = rock_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = rock_lda_pred$class)
print(conf_mat)
cat("Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(conf_mat)) / sum(conf_mat), "\n")

# Kelp
kelp_lda_model <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = kelp_clean_data)
kelp_lda_pred  <- predict(kelp_lda_model, newdata = kelp_clean_data)

conf_mat <- table(Actual = kelp_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = kelp_lda_pred$class)
print(conf_mat)
cat("Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(conf_mat)) / sum(conf_mat), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(MASS)

# Train urchin LDA models

# CCA
cca_lda_model <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = cca_clean_data)

cca_lda_train_pred <- predict(cca_lda_model, newdata = cca_clean_data)
cca_lda_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = cca_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = cca_lda_train_pred$class)
cca_lda_conf_rate  <- prop.table(cca_lda_conf_mat, margin = 1)
cat("--- CCA LDA ---\n")
print(cca_lda_conf_mat)
print(round(cca_lda_conf_rate, 3))
cat("Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(cca_lda_conf_mat)) / sum(cca_lda_conf_mat), "\n\n")

# LOO-CV
cca_lda_cv <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = cca_clean_data, CV = TRUE)
cca_cv_conf <- table(Actual = cca_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = cca_lda_cv$class)
cat("CCA LOO-CV Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(cca_cv_conf)) / sum(cca_cv_conf), "\n\n")

# Bare Rock
rock_lda_model <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = rock_clean_data)

rock_lda_train_pred <- predict(rock_lda_model, newdata = rock_clean_data)
rock_lda_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = rock_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = rock_lda_train_pred$class)
rock_lda_conf_rate  <- prop.table(rock_lda_conf_mat, margin = 1)
cat("--- Bare Rock LDA ---\n")
print(rock_lda_conf_mat)
print(round(rock_lda_conf_rate, 3))
cat("Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(rock_lda_conf_mat)) / sum(rock_lda_conf_mat), "\n\n")

# LOO-CV
rock_lda_cv <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = rock_clean_data, CV = TRUE)
rock_cv_conf <- table(Actual = rock_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = rock_lda_cv$class)
cat("Rock LOO-CV Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(rock_cv_conf)) / sum(rock_cv_conf), "\n\n")

# Kelp
kelp_lda_model <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = kelp_clean_data)

kelp_lda_train_pred <- predict(kelp_lda_model, newdata = kelp_clean_data)
kelp_lda_conf_mat   <- table(Actual = kelp_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = kelp_lda_train_pred$class)
kelp_lda_conf_rate  <- prop.table(kelp_lda_conf_mat, margin = 1)
cat("--- Kelp LDA ---\n")
print(kelp_lda_conf_mat)
print(round(kelp_lda_conf_rate, 3))
cat("Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(kelp_lda_conf_mat)) / sum(kelp_lda_conf_mat), "\n\n")

# LOO-CV
kelp_lda_cv <- lda(TYPE ~ ACI + NDSI, data = kelp_clean_data, CV = TRUE)
kelp_cv_conf <- table(Actual = kelp_clean_data$TYPE, Predicted = kelp_lda_cv$class)
cat("Kelp LOO-CV Misclassification Rate:", 1 - sum(diag(kelp_cv_conf)) / sum(kelp_cv_conf), "\n\n")

# Predict all three onto full habitat_model_data
cca_probs_lda_full  <- predict(cca_lda_model,
                                newdata = data.frame(ACI  = habitat_model_data$ACI,
                                                     NDSI = habitat_model_data$NDSI))$posterior[, "URCHIN_CCA"]

rock_probs_lda_full <- predict(rock_lda_model,
                                newdata = data.frame(ACI  = as.numeric(habitat_model_data$ACI),
                                                     NDSI = as.numeric(habitat_model_data$NDSI)))$posterior[, "URCHINS_BARE_ROCK"]

kelp_probs_lda_full <- predict(kelp_lda_model,
                                newdata = data.frame(ACI  = habitat_model_data$ACI,
                                                     NDSI = habitat_model_data$NDSI))$posterior[, "URCHIN_KELP"]

# PCA on three urchin LDA probabilities
urchin_prob_lda_df <- data.frame(
  cca_prob  = cca_probs_lda_full,
  rock_prob = rock_probs_lda_full,
  kelp_prob = kelp_probs_lda_full
)

urchin_lda_pca <- prcomp(urchin_prob_lda_df, scale. = TRUE)
cat("PCA variance explained:\n")
print(summary(urchin_lda_pca)$importance)

# Extract PC1
pc1_lda <- urchin_lda_pca$x[, "PC1"]

# Regression against habitat LDA probability
lm_pc1_lda <- lm(prob_barren_lda ~ pc1_lda)
cat("\n--- PC1 vs Habitat LDA Probability Regression ---\n")
print(summary(lm_pc1_lda))

# Build plot dataframe
pc1_lda_df <- data.frame(
  pc1         = pc1_lda,
  prob_barren = prob_barren_lda,
  SITE        = habitat_model_data$SITE,
  TYPE        = habitat_model_data$TYPE
)

# Plot
ggplot(pc1_lda_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = SITE), alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = SITE, group = SITE), method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_lda_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_lda_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_pc1_lda)$r.squared, 3),
                          ", P < 0.0001"),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4.5) +
 scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Harris_Island"  = "red",
    "Samsing_Cove"   = "orange",
    "Sandy_Cove"     = "pink",
    "Battery_Island" = "blue",
    "Crow_Island"    = "purple",
    "Middle_Island"  = "green"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x     = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y     = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (LDA)",
    color = "Site"
  ) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

## PC1 with different curves

```{r}
library(patchwork)

# Linear
p_linear <- ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = min(pc1_df$pc1), y = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Linear | RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_pc1)$r.squared, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Linear", x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)", y = "P(Barren)")

# Loess
p_loess <- ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "LOESS", x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)", y = "P(Barren)")

# Quadratic
lm_quad <- lm(prob_barren ~ poly(pc1, 2), data = pc1_df)
p_quad <- ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2), color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = min(pc1_df$pc1), y = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Quadratic | RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_quad)$r.squared, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Quadratic", x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)", y = "P(Barren)")

# Cubic
lm_cubic <- lm(prob_barren ~ poly(pc1, 3), data = pc1_df)
p_cubic <- ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 3), color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = min(pc1_df$pc1), y = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Cubic | RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_cubic)$r.squared, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Cubic", x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)", y = "P(Barren)")

# Exponential
lm_exp <- lm(log(prob_barren + 0.001) ~ pc1, data = pc1_df)
p_exp <- ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = gaussian(link = "log")),
              color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = min(pc1_df$pc1), y = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Exponential | RÂ˛ = ", round(summary(lm_exp)$r.squared, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Exponential", x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)", y = "P(Barren)")

# Logistic
lm_logistic <- glm(prob_barren ~ pc1, data = pc1_df, family = quasibinomial())
p_logistic <- ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = quasibinomial()),
              color = "black", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Logistic", x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)", y = "P(Barren)")

# Combine
(p_linear + p_loess) / (p_quad + p_cubic) / (p_exp + p_logistic)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Fit biexponential using nls
# Need good starting values or it won't converge
biexp_fit <- nls(
  prob_barren ~ a * exp(b * pc1) + c * exp(d * pc1),
  data  = pc1_df,
  start = list(a = 0.5, b = 0.1, c = 0.5, d = -0.1),
  control = nls.control(maxiter = 200)
)

summary(biexp_fit)

# RÂ˛ for nls (not automatic, calculate manually)
ss_res <- sum(residuals(biexp_fit)^2)
ss_tot <- sum((pc1_df$prob_barren - mean(pc1_df$prob_barren))^2)
r2_biexp <- 1 - ss_res / ss_tot
cat("Biexponential RÂ˛:", round(r2_biexp, 3), "\n")

# Plot
pc1_range <- seq(min(pc1_df$pc1), max(pc1_df$pc1), length.out = 500)
biexp_pred <- predict(biexp_fit, newdata = data.frame(pc1 = pc1_range))
biexp_line <- data.frame(pc1 = pc1_range, prob_barren = biexp_pred)

ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(data = biexp_line, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren),
            color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Biexponential | RÂ˛ = ", round(r2_biexp, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Biexponential Fit",
    x     = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y     = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)"
  )
```

```{r}
# Simple exponential
exp_fit <- nls(
  prob_barren ~ a * exp(b * pc1),
  data    = pc1_df,
  start   = list(a = 0.3, b = 0.1),
  control = nls.control(maxiter = 500, minFactor = 1e-10)
)

ss_res  <- sum(residuals(exp_fit)^2)
ss_tot  <- sum((pc1_df$prob_barren - mean(pc1_df$prob_barren))^2)
r2_exp  <- 1 - ss_res / ss_tot
cat("Simple exponential RÂ˛:", round(r2_exp, 3), "\n")

pc1_range <- seq(min(pc1_df$pc1), max(pc1_df$pc1), length.out = 500)
exp_pred  <- predict(exp_fit, newdata = data.frame(pc1 = pc1_range))
exp_line  <- data.frame(pc1 = pc1_range, prob_barren = exp_pred)

ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(data = exp_line, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren),
            color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Exponential | RÂ˛ = ", round(r2_exp, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)"
  )
```

```{r}
# Extract hour from TIME..UTC. column
model_data$HOUR_UTC <- hour(hms(model_data$TIME..UTC.))

# Add to pc1_df
pc1_df$HOUR_UTC <- model_data$HOUR_UTC

# Check it worked
table(pc1_df$HOUR_UTC)
```

```{r}
# Fit exponential with hour as additional predictor
exp_hour_fit <- nls(
  prob_barren ~ a * exp(b * pc1 + c * HOUR_UTC),
  data    = pc1_df,
  start   = list(a = 0.3, b = 0.1, c = 0.01),
  control = nls.control(maxiter = 500, minFactor = 1e-10)
)

summary(exp_hour_fit)

ss_res      <- sum(residuals(exp_hour_fit)^2)
ss_tot      <- sum((pc1_df$prob_barren - mean(pc1_df$prob_barren))^2)
r2_exp_hour <- 1 - ss_res / ss_tot
cat("Exponential with hour RÂ˛:", round(r2_exp_hour, 3), "\n")

# Create prediction grid over PC1 and hour ranges
pc1_range  <- seq(min(pc1_df$pc1), max(pc1_df$pc1), length.out = 200)
hour_range <- seq(0, 23, by = 1)
pred_grid  <- expand.grid(pc1 = pc1_range, HOUR_UTC = hour_range)
pred_grid$prob_barren <- predict(exp_hour_fit, newdata = pred_grid)

# Plot with hour colored points and fitted lines per hour
ggplot(pc1_df, aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren, color = HOUR_UTC)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = pred_grid %>% filter(HOUR_UTC %in% c(0:23)),
            aes(x = pc1, y = prob_barren, group = HOUR_UTC),
            linewidth = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            color = c("navy", "cyan", "gold", "red")[
              match(pred_grid %>% filter(HOUR_UTC %in% c(0:23)) %>% pull(HOUR_UTC),
                    c(0:23))]) +
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colors = c("navy", "steelblue", "cyan", "gold", "orange", "red", "purple", "navy"),
    values = scales::rescale(c(0:23)),
    name   = "Hour of Day (UTC)"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x     = min(pc1_df$pc1),
           y     = max(pc1_df$prob_barren),
           label = paste0("Exp + Hour | RÂ˛ = ", round(r2_exp_hour, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "More Urchin Noise (PC1)",
    y = "Probability of Assignment as Urchin Barrens (SVM)"
  )
```

## PC1 and Ecological Variables
